flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northwest Mississippi Community College rose 307% between 2006 and 2009 (3.6% → 14.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwest Mississippi Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northwest Mississippi Community College fell 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $3.7k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northwest Mississippi Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (59.3% → 67.7%).
